posts.title: Building Scalable Systems: Lessons from the Trenches

posts.title: Finding Stillness in a World That Rewards Busyness

posts.title: The Future of AI in Software Development
posts.excerpt: AI coding tools are transforming the developer workflow. I'm exploring what this means for how we design, build, and ship software — and what it means for us as engineers.
